description: Плотность водно-спиртового раствора в г/мл (Density of water-alcohol solution in g/ml)
note: Содержание спирта при 20°C в % по объёму (Alcohol content at 20°C in % by volume). Table rows are indexed by temperature in °C. Full 5-decimal values reconstructed from abbreviated notation in the original tables.

usage_notes.how_to_read: To find the density of a water-alcohol solution: 1) Find the table entry for your alcohol concentration (%), 2) Find the row for your temperature (°C), 3) The value is density in g/ml at that temperature. The standard reference temperature is 20°C.
usage_notes.temperature_keys: Temperatures +7 to +40 appear on one page, temperatures 0 to -1 and then 2-25 (below-zero °C) appear on the continuation page for each alcohol range.
usage_notes.null_values: null indicates data was not visible/available in the source image for that cell.
usage_notes.coverage: Alcohol content from 0% to 100% by volume, temperatures from approximately +40°C down to -1°C and below (sub-zero range marked 2-25 after the -1 row).
